name: Akane's Resolve
description: Akane's signature card. Deals bonus damage equal to her current rage stacks.

name: Kiro's Shadowstep
description: Teleport behind the target and gain stealth for one turn.

name: Healing Salve
description: Restore 30% HP to an ally. Removes one debuff.

name: Storm Bolt
description: Deal lightning damage to up to 3 enemies in a line.

name: Guard Stance
description: Gain a shield equal to 25% of max HP. Lasts 2 turns.

name: Soul Exchange
description: Swap HP percentages with the target. Once per battle.

name: Mark of Oblivion
description: Marked target cannot be healed for 3 turns. Priority-saved.

name: Common Slime
description: A basic summoned slime. Taunts for 1 turn.

name: Wind Griffon
description: A flying beast that grants the team +15% speed while alive.

name: Crimson Dragon King
description: A legendary dragon. Breathes fire on all enemies for massive damage. 5-turn cooldown.
